a:r.a:t: Claude Code가 GEODE를 구축하는 실제 실행 흐름입니다. 각 축은 하네스의 제어 평면에 대응합니다.
CLAUDE.md + Skills inject into Claude Code
AgenticLoop: file R/W, test, git (max 5 rounds)
CI Ratchet: pytest + mypy + ruff + test-count
Port/Adapter DI required. Send API Clean Context. Decision Tree code-based. Token Guard summary field. graph.stream() progress tracking.
while CI fails: Claude Code auto-fix and retry. Test count monotonic increase only. 436 PRs, zero regressions.
Q1: grep codebase. Q2: what breaks? Q3: how to measure? Q4: simplest impl? Q5: frontier 3 solved this? Fail any = removed from scope.
Backlog to In Progress to In Review to Done. 3-Checkpoint: alloc, merge (CI 5/5), verify (next session). Single SOT on main branch.
